outputs.label: Dedicated program
outputs.notes: NDI Video Monitor: connect to this name once the output-router publishes PGM.

outputs.label: Dedicated multiview
outputs.notes: Multiview layout → publish to this NDI name for the main display.

outputs.label: Flexible / CAM / custom NDI
outputs.notes: Switch assignment to ndi_custom and type an on-net NDI source name.
